forbidden_changes: do not only scale all coefficients
do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not treat noisy partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: explicitly avoid known failures: early_failure, low_progress_survival
preserve useful patterns: partial_progress trajectories exist and should be preserved or improved
gate or remove components: crash_penalty, low_progress_survival_gate, stability_penalty, ungated_contact_bonus, ungated_survival_bonus
preserve or strengthen components: approach_progress, leg_bonus, terminal_failure_penalty, timeout_penalty

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
